Document:
# Misc
Factions listed here are headless and their relations cannot be changed.
## Rookies
Rookies are the freshest of fresh stalkers. Just arrived across the border and armed with little more than their jackets and the will to pursue their own goals in the Zone, Rookies should be shown patience by neutral factions and leniency by hostile ones.
The life of a Rookie is short, requiring 10 hours of play time to unlock the Loner role, and offers a somewhat forgiving experience. Rookies who find themselves struggling or running out of the gear from their starter kits are welcome to AHELP for assistance.
## Loners
Loners make up the bulk of the Zone's inhabitants and aren't considered a faction so much as a loose collection of individuals with their own goals.
Loners cannot rob each other but they're allowed to rob any faction they're hostile with, and they're allowed to kill each other in red and black zones (see [textlink="Zone Rulings" link="RuleC6Zona14"]).
## Journalists
Reporters, United Nations journalists, and freelance documentarians make up the Journalist faction. Though rare in the Zone, they seek to record the happenings within whether out of interest in the Zone and the people there or purely for profit.
